name: openEuler Marketing SIG
description: The Marketing SIG is responsible for organizing openEuler community activities, including but not limited to Meetup, Summit, and live broadcast, coordinating community members to participate in the activities, and widely publicizing the activities through coordination channels before and after the activities.

name: openEuler Marketing SIG Repository List
description: openEuler Marketing SIG maintains 2 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Marketing SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The Marketing SIG is responsible for organizing openEuler community activities, including but not limited to Meetup, Summit, and live broadcast, coordinating community members to participate in the activities, and widely publicizing the activities through coordination channels before and after the activities.. The SIG has 2 core members and maintains 2 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Marketing SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Marketing SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at marketing@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Marketing SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Marketing SIG maintains 2 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Marketing.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler Marketing SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Marketing SIG has 2 Maintainers, including: maquanyi, zhengzhenyu. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
